description: Sync Zendesk Sell (formerly Base CRM) contacts, leads, deals, notes, tasks, and pipelines into the Shielva knowledge base via the Zendesk Sell REST API v3.

install_fields.label: Client ID
install_fields.placeholder: Your Zendesk Sell OAuth application Client ID
install_fields.help: Find your Client ID in Zendesk Sell Settings → OAuth → Registered Applications.

install_fields.label: Client Secret
install_fields.placeholder: Your Zendesk Sell OAuth application Client Secret
install_fields.help: Copy the Client Secret from your registered OAuth application in Zendesk Sell.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: The URI Zendesk Sell will redirect to after authorization. Must match the URI registered in your OAuth application.

methods.name: Install / Authenticate
methods.description: Validate OAuth access token by calling GET /users/self.

methods.name: OAuth2 Authorization URL
methods.description: Build and return the Zendesk Sell OAuth 2.0 authorization URL for the user to approve access.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Ping GET /users/self and return HEALTHY, DEGRADED, or OFFLINE.

methods.name: Sync Records
methods.description: Full sync of Zendesk Sell contacts, leads, deals, notes, tasks, and pipelines into the knowledge base.

methods.name: List Contacts
methods.description: Paginated list of Zendesk Sell contacts.

methods.name: List Leads
methods.description: Paginated list of Zendesk Sell leads.

methods.name: List Deals
methods.description: Paginated list of Zendesk Sell deals.

methods.name: List Notes
methods.description: Paginated list of Zendesk Sell notes.

methods.name: List Tasks
methods.description: Paginated list of Zendesk Sell tasks.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync all Zendesk Sell resources into the knowledge base.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: Return a single page of contacts from Zendesk Sell.

apis.name: List Leads
apis.description: Return a single page of leads from Zendesk Sell.

apis.name: List Deals
apis.description: Return a single page of deals from Zendesk Sell.

apis.name: List Notes
apis.description: Return a single page of notes from Zendesk Sell.

apis.name: List Tasks
apis.description: Return a single page of tasks from Zendesk Sell.

apis.name: List Pipelines
apis.description: Return all pipelines from Zendesk Sell.

name: ZendeskSellConnector
